latest_feature.name: Report pipeline policy parity
latest_feature.head: c0f27b845403b1aa2d81833aaf9b89b9091e7680
latest_feature.summary: Report generation now uses a ReportPolicy registry as the single section-policy source for Markdown, DOCX, PDF, PPTX, Excel, and Quality Gate profiles. Salary/data reports suppress irrelevant Financial Snapshot, Root Causes, Delay, and Contractual sections while management/general reports keep the full structure. The frontend accessibility cancel-dialog fixture now uses a cancelable running status so it tests the focus trap without clicking a disabled Cancel control.
latest_feature.not_changed: production_status, must_not_deploy, LIVE state, ownCloud, Odoo extended source work, new financial/risk/delay/document report types
latest_feature.operator_steps_pending: Branch review, merge to main, and an explicitly requested NOT_LIVE-only deploy remain pending. LIVE must stay disabled.
